finding_results.notes: Replaced abstract self-verdict/checklist phrasing with embodied Marisol memory and explicit interpersonal consequence Eli cannot control (Theo/Nora/June routing). Removed prior moral-lesson closure in the late-train reflection.

Added an on-page action-decision-consequence unit at Union Station: Eli must choose between preserving cash or buying hard-copy proof under boarding pressure, pays immediate additional print cost, and boards with reduced cash plus physical strain.
Replaced recurring 'landed harder' formula with a fresh vestibule-instability beat and bodily reaction.

summary: Completed the p1 structural/craft pass for chapter_16: high-priority accountability language is now concrete and consequential, transit pressure includes enacted choice-cost dynamics, and repetitive line-level formula was replaced while continuity/voice constraints were preserved.
